'''[[Major/Legends|Major]] Shep Jion''' was a [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] of [[House Melantha]] and a officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. Prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] he was a lanky man in his thirties with close cut blonde hair. He was an honorable man who was often torn between loyalty to his house and the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]].

He was transferred back to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] under the command of [[Major General]] [[Tessala Corvae]]. Shep was a member of the [[Order of the Kilmar Bange]] and as such had orders to keep an eye on his superior officer.
